title: lippia nodiflora var. rosea
intro: Lippia nodiflora var. rosea, also known as red Mexican tea, is a plant species that belongs to the verbena family and is native to Mexico and Central America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Lippia nodiflora var. rosea include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health. Lippia nodiflora var. rosea can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture or essential oil for topical use.
